data.name: Homelab Server
data.summary: Homelab infrastructure-as-docs: OPNsense edge, Caddy reverse proxy, Docker service stacks, coding/MCP infra.

data.statement: OPNsense remains the firewall/NAT/VPN/DNS edge unchanged; only Caddy TLS-terminates and reverse-proxies. Never open new Fritzbox/OPNsense ports — add a Caddy vhost + Unbound *.vm override instead.
Internet-exposed services sit behind Authelia SSO via the Caddy authelia snippet; no anonymous public access to management/memory APIs.

data.name: Caddy config source of truth
data.example: OPNsense os-caddy caddy.d/ files (10-services.conf for *.ohje.ooguy.com); server/network/caddy/Caddyfile mirrors them 1:1. Backends via Unbound *.vm host-overrides (cloud/manage/media/hosting/coding.vm).

data.title: Reverse proxy moved from pfSense HAProxy to Caddy
data.rationale: Caddy handles TLS termination + ACME (Dynu wildcard DNS-01, Cloudflare per-site); OPNsense security posture unchanged.
